register.title: MangaStudio Pro
register.subtitle: Professional Manga Production Management System
register.roleMangakaDesc: For authors, project managers, and series manuscript owners.
register.roleAssistantDesc: For collaborating artists, editors, and studio staff.
register.securityWarningDesc: All newly registered accounts will be in a Pending status. Accounts will only be activated after Super Admin verifies identity and credentials. Editor or Board roles can only be granted by system administrators.
register.accountInfoSubtitle: Please fill in all details to continue registration.
register.verifyEmailSubtitle: Please enter the 6-digit OTP sent to
register.adminApprovalNotice: After registration, your profile will be reviewed by Super Admin before unlocking full production system functionality.
register.sendOtpSuccess: Verification code sent to your email.
register.sendOtpError: Could not send the verification code.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subtitle: Please set a new password for your account.
changePassword.success: Password changed successfully. Please sign in again.
changePassword.errorTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
changePassword.errorGeneric: Could not change password. Please try again.
